title: PvP Beyond
description: A PvP Modpack with its key goal of increasing your FPS and adding Key Mods for PvP (Totem Counter, Armor durability HuD, etc.) with a selection of the best PvP texture packs to choose from all while making sure you don't get banned from any PvP Server
body:
# PvP Beyond **Pvp Beyond** is a pvp modpack aimed torwards **Boosting FPS** and adding a lot of **PvP QoL** mods and resourcepacks to **improve** your PvPing experience. ## Modpack Features - 💥 Damage Indicators - 🔥 Lower Fire & Smaller Items - 🧱 Armor & Tools Durability - 📃 Totem Counter - ⏲️ Sprint Indicator - ⏰ Effect Timer ## Modpack Optimizations - Reduced Resourge Usage - Reduced RAM Usage - Improved Entity Rendering - Improved Chuncks Rendering - Improved Player Rendering ## FPS Test **Before PvP Beyond:** ![Before PvP Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a4235843e2bd6fb5612f79fed8ba6d714d758f5.png) **After PvP Beyond** ![After PvP Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d92ca442c267fc61f2f89239d757056cdc524b43.png)
Mod List ### Performance/Optimization Mods 2. Sodium 3. Sodium Extra 4. Sodium Leaf Culling 4. More Culling 5. Clumps 6. Bad Optimizations 7. Dynamic FPS 8. Enhanced Block Entities 9. Entity Culling 10. FerriteCore 11. Imediately Fast 13. Krypton 14. Noisium 15. ThreadTweak 16. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine 17. ScalableLux 18. ModernFix 19. Very Many Players 20. Spark 21. Packet Fixer ### PvP Optimization 1. AppleSkin 2. Damage Numbers 3. Durability Plus 4. Simple Armor HUD 7. Totem Counter 8. Health Indicators 9. Effect Timer Plus 11. Consumable Optimizer 12. Sprint Indicator ### QoL Mods 1. Full Brightness Toggle 2. Zoomify 4. Shulker Box Tooltip 5. Simple Voice Chat 6. No Chat Reports 7. Mod Menu 8. Model Gap Fix ### Dependencies 1. Fabric API 2. Fabric Language Kotlin 3. Text Placeholder API 4. YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) 5. Ukulib 6. Collective 7. Arhitecture API
Resource Packs ### Enabled by Default 1. Low fire ### PvP and FPS Packs **1. [Storm](https://www.mediafire.com/file/momkcfgagfisbwq/Deivii_17_Storm.zip/file)** ![Storm Pvp Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f3e3ab12c4e02915f53d979fe62c60d7b3fbaa2.png)
**2. [Blocky Pack for 36s](https://rekonise.com/blocky_pack_for_36s-iv4wo)** ![Blocky Pack for 36s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a49be51d1e92f744f19112ea3860feb586a55df2.png)
**3. [Gank Squad | Fatal Edit](https://rekonise.com/g...​)** ![Gank Squad | Final Edit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1efed3f7ed1a238c5e2c585b5f86996253327b2.png)
**4. [16x16 Legacy Edit](https://www.mediafire.com/file/jbx1p4hpbx0hkxl/%252316x16_LEGACY_EDIT.zip/file)** ![16x16 Legacy Edit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f9bb1c0abec24ed48e0e7493774927b673f4816.png)
**5. Scroutopia** (Inside the modpack) ![Scroutopia Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8bb9bd3fd51732a14cebecbd931b92f911c2f2d.png)
FaQ **Q:** Why does this modpack have more than 1 PvP Resource Pack?
**A:** PvP Beyond has more than 1 PvP pack installed so the user can choose the one they like, want to use (shorter swords, longer swords, etc.)

**Q:** Why does the modpack contain other mods which aren't necesarly used to optimize FPS
**A:** Mods listed under QoL are added to enhance your experience as most people use those mods while PvPing.

**Q:** Am I allowed to use this modpack on servers like PvPLegacy, Hoplite, Hypixel, LokaMc?
**A:** Yes, there are no mods that provide unfair advantages and JourneyMap is set to fairplay by default.

**Q:** Why is there an external download link for some resource packs?
**A:** I don't want to fill the modpack with a lot of resource packs as that would take up space so I left some recommended packs for users to choose from

``` DM "VoinicuMic_" on Discord for inquiries or support. If you believe you have a good PvP Resource Pack please make sure to send it to me and I will include it in the modpack. Compatible with Lunar Client and every Launcher that has Modrinth compatibility. ```
